steps.title: Link claim to example
steps.content: The second sentence says Siletz stories support the shipwreck belief. The next sentence gives one concrete story detail: beeswax from the cargo washed ashore after the ship was lost.

steps.title: Reject cause, contrast, similarity
steps.content: A signals cause, C signals contrast, and D signals a parallel idea. The sentence needs an example transition for a specific story supporting the belief. The answer is B.
